*** 4 INJ *** Corrects previous tstm wnd dmg report from 1 NW San Francisco. Tree collapsed on a car early Friday evening at the corner of Golden Gate Avenue and Laguna Street in San Francisco. Four people were injured inside the vehicle. Wind gusts were estimated to be approximately 40 mph at this time.

Flash flooding reported around 2:40 pm at Ralph Lane in Northern Monterey County. Water is reported to be up to the window sills of homes along Ralph Lane. A temporary evacuation point has been set up at the Prunedale Library and half a dozen rescues and submerged cars have been reported.
Corrects previous tstm wnd gst report from 26 SW Greenfield. Mesonet station 488PG Lime Creek Road. Occurred in conjunction with a passing convective shower. Station elevation 741 feet.

Corrects previous landslide report from 12 SW Carmel Valley Vill. Delayed report. Landslide north of Big Sur near Rocky Creek Bridge. Time is of initial report. This follows 48-hour rain totals of 3.9 inches from a nearby gauge. Resulted in complete closure of US1 for indefinite time due to undermining of roadway.
